zh.lifeSummary: 當Gwenllian Ferch Llywelyn於1500年出生在英國威爾斯蒙格莫利夏爾其麥斯時，她的父親Llywelyn ap Leuan ap Llewelyn Fychan31歲，母親Mallt ferch Morgan27歲。她和Ieuan "Llwyd" Ap Owain至少有8個兒子和6個女兒。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Gwenllian Ferch Llywelyn于1500年出生在英国威尔斯蒙格莫利夏爾其麥斯时，她的父亲Llywelyn ap Leuan ap Llewelyn Fychan31岁，母亲Mallt ferch Morgan27岁。她和Ieuan "Llwyd" Ap Owain至少有8个儿子和6个女儿。

nameMeanings.name: Ferch
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: variant of   Ferg  . Compare   Verch  .
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förtsch (see Foertsch ).
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förch (see Foerch ).

variants.name: Ferg
meanings: German: occupational name for a ferryman, Middle High German verje, verge.

nameMeanings.name: Llywelyn
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Llewellyn
meanings: Welsh: from the personal name Llywelyn, derived from British Celtic Lugubelinos, itself from the divine name Lugus + an uncertain second element often used alone as a name. Through association with llew ‘lion’, it was altered to Llewelyn. This was the name of two princes of north Wales who held the Normans at bay for many years in the 13th century. Etymologically speaking, the form with a fourth -l- is an error, not found as an original Welsh name, but this is now much the most common spelling in the US.

nameMeanings.name: Gwenllian
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Traditional: from gwen, the feminine form of gwyn ‘white, fair; blessed, holy’ ( see Gwen ) + lliant ‘flood, flow’ (probably in the transferred sense ‘foamy’ or ‘white’, referring to a pale complexion).

en.lifeSummary: When Gwenllian Ferch Llywelyn was born in 1500, in Cemais, Montgomeryshire, Wales, United Kingdom, her father, Llywelyn ap Leuan ap Llewelyn Fychan, was 31 and her mother, Mallt ferch Morgan, was 27. She had at least 8 sons and 6 daughters with Ieuan "Llwyd" Ap Owain.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Gwenllian Ferch Llywelyn est née en 1500, à Cemais, Montgomeryshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, son père, Llywelyn ap Leuan ap Llewelyn Fychan, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Mallt ferch Morgan, avait 27 ans. Elle a eu au moins 8 fils et 6 filles avec Ieuan "Llwyd" Ap Owain.

de.lifeSummary: Als Gwenllian Ferch Llywelyn 1500 in Cemais, Montgomeryshire, Wales, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Llywelyn ap Leuan ap Llewelyn Fychan 31 und ihre Mutter Mallt ferch Morgan 27. Sie hatte mit Ieuan "Llwyd" Ap Owain mindestens 8 Söhne und 6 Töchter.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Gwenllian Ferch Llywelyn è nata il nel 1500 nel Cemais, Montgomeryshire, Galles, Regno Unito, sua padre, Llywelyn ap Leuan ap Llewelyn Fychan, aveva 31 anni e sua madre, Mallt ferch Morgan, aveva 27 anni. Lei avuto almeno 8 figli e 6 figlie con Ieuan "Llwyd" Ap Owain.

ja.lifeSummary: Gwenllian Ferch Llywelynが1500年にイギリスウェールズモントゴメリシュアイアセメイスで生まれた時，父Llywelyn ap Leuan ap Llewelyn Fychanは31歳，母Mallt ferch Morganは27歳であった。彼女はIeuan "Llwyd" Ap Owainとの間に少なくとも8人の息子と6人の娘をもうけた。

ko.lifeSummary: Gwenllian Ferch Llywelyn(이)가 1500년 영국 웨일스 몽고머이실르 세메이에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Llywelyn ap Leuan ap Llewelyn Fychan(은)는 31세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mallt ferch Morgan(은)는 27세였다. 그녀는 Ieuan "Llwyd" Ap Owain(와)과 적어도 여덟 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Gwenllian Ferch Llywelyn родилась в 1500 г. в местности кемеи, монтгомиришир, Уэльс, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Llywelyn ap Leuan ap Llewelyn Fychan было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Mallt ferch Morgan, 27. У неё было по крайней мере 8 сыновей и 6 дочерей от Ieuan "Llwyd" Ap Owain.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Gwenllian Ferch Llywelyn nació en 1500, en Cemais, Montgomeryshire, Gales, Reino Unido, su papá, Llywelyn ap Leuan ap Llewelyn Fychan, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Mallt ferch Morgan, tenía 27 años. Tuvo por lo menos 8 hijos y 6 hijas con Ieuan "Llwyd" Ap Owain.
